title: Imperial Teen announce first tour in six years, including dates with The Breeders
caption: Imperial Teen hitting the road after six years! 🚗🎶 Catch them jamming with The Breeders on select dates. 🎉 #MusicNews

title: Tokyo Police Club frontman fronts new Castle Rat-adjacent “peasant metal” project Netherwilds (!!)
caption: 🎸 Dive into the wild side with Tokyo Police Club's frontman in his new "peasant metal" project Netherwilds! 🤘 #NewMusicAlert

title: Celebrate Scream’s 30th Anniversary with Marco Beltrami’s Original Score on Vinyl
caption: 🔊 Dive into horror vibes! Scream turns 30 with a killer vinyl reissue of Marco Beltrami's iconic score. 🎶💿 #Scream30 #VinylRevival
